description_long: This jet ski features a boxy, angular design with a flat, wide top surface and pronounced vertical and horizontal fins or ridges along its edges. The exterior appears to be constructed from a dark, metallic material with a slightly reflective, weathered finish, showing subtle variations in tone and some rusty patches. The body is solid and robust, with a central cavity or recess visible from certain angles, possibly for storage or mechanical access. The overall form is geometric and industrial, lacking the typical streamlined curves of most recreational jet skis. There are no visible controls, handlebars, or seating areas, and the structure is dominated by sharp, straight lines. The color palette is primarily dark gray to black, with hints of brownish rust.
description: A dark, angular jet ski with a flat top, sharp fins, and a metallic, slightly weathered surface. The design is boxy and industrial, with a central recess and no visible controls or seating.
description_view_0: From this view, the flat top surface and two prominent vertical fins are clearly visible, along with a central recess at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the solid, rectangular body and the depth of the central cavity, with the fins extending outward.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the flat top and the symmetrical placement of the fins, with the central recess less visible.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the metallic texture, the rusty patches, and the sharp, geometric lines of the structure.
attribute_handlebar_design: No handlebar is visible in any view.
attribute_seat_configuration: No seat or seating configuration is visible; the top surface is flat and featureless.
